charts.SystemPrompt: A matrix plot displays expression status and clinical variables across samples in a grid. The "geneNames" field should ONLY contain gene names. The "terms" field should ONLY contain clinical/dictionary variable names from the dataset (e.g. "diaggrp", "sex", "agedx", "genetic_race"). At least one of "geneNames" or "terms" must be provided. If the user specifies filters to restrict the sample set, include them in "simpleFilter" using the same format as other chart types.

charts.SystemPrompt: Pre-built scatter plots available are: TermdbTest TSNE. The user can overlay clinical variables or gene expression on these plots via color, shape, or divide (Z). To remove an overlay, set the corresponding field to null. If the user does not specify a plot name, default to 'TermdbTest TSNE'. If the user says 'tsne' or 't-sne' match it to 'TermdbTest TSNE'. This dataset does NOT have UMAP plots.
